meeting.title: Alex X Vrijen Wisdom Partners Coaching Transcript 2026 02 02t22 00 00.000z
meeting.summary: Vrijen Attawar and Alex Caveny discussed an advisor introduction for Julie, a family tech expert with Boston scene connections, to a founder who is currently taking a break due to personal circumstances. Vrijen shared that he is in Puerto Rico participating in the Zo team's offsite as an advisor and power user, noting the 7-8 person team may pursue fundraising. They analyzed the recent rise of autonomous AI agents like Claudebot, attributing its viral appeal to the "alive" feeling created by heartbeat features and long-standing memory, while contrasting Zo's more secure, robust approach with Claudebot's customizable but security-risk-prone "wild west" ecosystem.
